articles.title: Vitalik Buterin says ‘more still needs to be done’ over high Ethereum txn fees
articles.description: “Good user experience is not about the average case, it is about the worst case," the Ethereum co-founder wrote.

articles.title: AI Altcoin Based on Cardano (ADA) Rallies After Elon Musk ChatGPT Rumors Swirl
articles.description: An altcoin project focused on artificial general intelligence (AGI) technology has spiked following rumors that tech mogul Elon Musk had plans in the works for a new version of ChatGPT. Over the weekend, Musk told his 130 million Twitter followers how he was feeling about AGI and the potential threat it poses to humanity. “Having […]

articles.title: Cardano Reigns Supreme As Most Actively Developed Crypto Asset — Is ADA’s Moon Landing Guaranteed?
articles.description: Cardano (ADA), like the rest of the crypto market, has had a horrid year in terms of prices. However, ADA still managed to clinch the title of the most developed chain, outpacing top rivals such as Ethereum and Polkadot.

articles.title: Cardano-Based SingularityNET (AGIX) Soars After Elon Musk Related AI Rumor
articles.description: Cardano-based artificial intelligence marketplace SingularityNET (AGIX) has seen its price rise by 11% in the last 24 hours, making it today’s top performer in the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market cap. The sudden rally started shortly after rumors surfaced that Elon Musk wants to build a ChatGPT competitor. As the 4-hour chart below shows, AGIX […]

articles.title: Investors bearish on Solana [SOL] as continued outages stem momentum
articles.description: Since the outage on 25 February, Solana dropped by over 3% until press time. A Twitter user pointed out that the repeated outages could be due to a design flaw. According to a tweet by Santiment, Solana’s [SOL] social volume reached a six-month high after the chain was hit by yet another network outage recently. […]

articles.title: CZ Slams FUD Of Binance Shuffling Assets Like FTX
articles.description: In an article published yesterday, Forbes once again attacked the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange Binance for alleged misconduct in handling customer funds. CEO Changpeng Zhao, better known as “CZ,” vehemently denied these claims today, accusing the news outlet of intentional false representations. These Are the Allegations Against Binance Forbes alleges in the article published Monday...

articles.title: Binance Denies Improper Use of $1.8B of Users’ Funds
articles.description: Binance was accused of moving almost $2Bn without permission. The exchange denied the rumors. Is it just FUD or damage control?

articles.title: Ethereum takes step closer to Shanghai-Capella with deployment on Sepolia testnet
articles.description: Ethereum developers have taken another step towards Shanghai-Capella upgrade by deploying it on the Sepolia test network.

articles.title: Coinbase exchange to delist Binance USD, says stablecoin ‘no longer met our listing standards’
articles.description: Coinbase, the world’s second largest cryptocurrency exchange, said Monday it is suspending trade in the Binance USD (BUSD) as of March 13.
